description: Grammar explained variance retest with 161 H+M anchors
methodology: 3-slot grammar model: sign classified as TERMINAL (T≥0.60), INITIAL (I≥0.50), MEDIAL (M≥0.65), else MIXED. Variance explained = fraction of tokens where predicted class = actual dominant class. Min 3 tokens per sign required.
_citation: Phase-133 grammar variance baseline (44.3% at 157 H+M). Anchors: INDUS_FINAL_ANCHORS.json (161 H+M). Corpus: Holdat V3 (1,670 seals, 7,002 tokens).
